comment.title: Comment Detected
comment.description: Comments are not allowed in JSON.

unquoted_key.title: Unquoted Key
unquoted_key.description: Property name must be in double quotes.

single_quotes.title: Single Quotes
single_quotes.description: JSON requires double quotes, not single quotes.
single_quotes.suggestion: Replace single quotes with double quotes

multiple_commas.title: Multiple Commas
multiple_commas.description: Consecutive commas are invalid JSON syntax.

missing_comma.title: Missing Comma
missing_comma.description: Missing comma between properties or values.

boolean_case.title: Invalid Boolean
boolean_case.description: Boolean values must be lowercase in JSON.

undefined_value.title: undefined Value
undefined_value.description: "undefined" is not a valid JSON value.

nan_value.title: NaN Value
nan_value.description: "NaN" is not a valid JSON value.

infinity_value.title: Infinity Value
infinity_value.description: "Infinity" is not a valid JSON value.

unquoted_string.title: Unquoted String Value
unquoted_string.description: String values must be in double quotes.

boolean_typo.title: Ambiguous Boolean
boolean_typo.description: Value looks like a boolean typo. Manual choice required.

duplicate_key.title: Duplicate Key
duplicate_key.description: JSON doesn't allow duplicate keys. Choose which value to keep.
duplicate_key.suggestion: Rename or remove one of the duplicate keys

structural_issue.title: Structural Issue
structural_issue.suggestion: Check and fix the JSON structure manually

encoding_issue.title: Encoding Issue
encoding_issue.description: Invalid or problematic character encoding detected.
encoding_issue.suggestion: Fix character encoding or escape special characters

invalid_unicode.title: Invalid Unicode Escape
invalid_unicode.suggestion: Fix the Unicode escape or remove invalid characters
